EVENT.TEXT: Following new legislation in @@camberus_656@@, the path to inner peace is paved with state-mandated punishment.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxxxii@@, spies caught red-handed are served cocktails on their first-class flights home.
Following new legislation in @@virtlandia@@, girls in elementary school classes gaze longingly at boys playing tag.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_656@@, frightened witnesses and seriously ill jurors wear the same handcuffs as the defendant.
Following new legislation in @@ydri@@, bridge salesmen line up for blocks to make their cases at Leader's office.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_656@@, the military struggles with recruitment.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxxix@@, the alarmingly racist TV show 'Bigtopians Say the Darndest Things' is a hit.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_656@@, Osearwynn consists only of government buildings and the mansions of government janitors.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxxvi@@, vital intelligence-gathering activities are put on hold as agents return home for seduction training and advanced poker instruction.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxxi@@, streaming video is considered to be a myth by most citizens.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxxvii@@, penurious citizens die from easily remedied ailments because they aren't 'taking enough initiative'.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_656@@, nocturnal light pollution is mostly blue.
Following new legislation in @@lotze@@, families make most of their annual income from government benefits.
@@rado_aazazaazzzaazaazaa@@ was founded in %%empire_of_great_britain%%.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxxiv@@, a passport is literally priceless.
Following new legislation in @@shangla@@, children are disappointed to learn that cavemen never had a yabba-dabba-doo time riding dinosaurs to work.
Following new legislation in @@justice_breyers_crazy_hypotheticals@@, crime suspects are forced to submit to blood testing.
Following new legislation in @@taustria@@, battlefield gains are quickly lost when enemies don't respect a time-out.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxxii@@, the word 'elite' appears as a synonym for various insults in the Canine Colonial Thesaurus.
Following new legislation in @@lossantos@@, the tenet of free speech is held dear.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_655@@, human tissue is grown in vats as a delicacy as well as for transplants.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxix@@, an increasing percentage of the population's youth have homosexual parents.
@@war_dogs_ccxix@@ was reclassified from "Psychotic Dictatorship" to "Corrupt Dictatorship".
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxvi@@, politicians stage photo ops featuring barely functional fighter jets.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_655@@, the long arm of the law possesses a rather slow hand.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxvii@@, Canine watches are often the only thing to survive a disaster intact.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_655@@, the nation's skies are now a wasteland.
@@camberus_655@@ was reclassified from "Corrupt Dictatorship" to "Psychotic Dictatorship".
Following new legislation in @@camberus_655@@, it's rare to find an unchewed pencil.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxiv@@, organ donation is compulsory.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_655@@, only 'organics' are permitted to be citizens.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxii@@, half of Canine history is deemed too unpatriotic to be mentioned in textbooks.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_654@@, prisoners due for execution often use their final statement to complain about soggy bread rolls.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccxi@@, diplomatic missions typically end with a flurry of childish insults, accusations and phlegm.
@@not_pacific@@ proposed constructing embassies between %%yet_another_region_refounded_again%% and %%insinuation_union%%.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_654@@, students can name the chiefs of proto-Bigtopian tribes before they can count to ten.
Following new legislation in @@desdemonia@@, war vets look after war animals.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_654@@, the politician's labor union forces stage names upon candidates.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccix@@, private businesses are paving paradises to put up parking lots.
Following new legislation in @@dumpster_city@@, aeroplanes have been converted into housing units after all air travel was outlawed.
Following new legislation in @@justice_breyers_crazy_hypotheticals@@, legislation sometimes has to battle through weeks of filibustering to pass.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_654@@, Asher Wiley's family members carry literal get-out-of-jail-free cards.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccvii@@, beating enemies to death with a baseball bat is legal if done within nine innings.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccvi@@, the nation's diplomatic missives are now delivered via sniper rifle.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_654@@, the Camberus 654ian government is the world's largest NGO.
Following new legislation in @@lotze@@, you're only as old as you feel.
Following new legislation in @@dombaness@@, advertisements for jobs in the sciences run in fashion magazines.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_cciv@@, the nation's weary schoolchildren excel at sport but must count scores on their fingers.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_653@@, citizens volunteer for tax audits to avoid the 80-page Practical Assessment Survey Tool On Religions.
Following new legislation in @@watersion@@, the art of conversation has been rediscovered.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_653@@, roosters that herald the rising sun are immediately sent to the slaughterhouse.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_ccii@@, a cat may look at a king and a dude can look at an ass.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_cci@@, one of the nation's leading exports is empty platitudes.

Following new legislation in @@camberus_653@@, a video of Asher Wiley wearing shock-blue face paint and smashing an electric guitar in front of a frenzied crowd is on endless repeat on the nightly news.
@@not_pacific@@ proposed constructing embassies between %%yet_another_region_refounded_again%% and %%region_of_tuff%%.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_653@@, diaper-wrapped shawarma is a fan-favorite.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_cxcix@@, the military has had its funding stripped back as the nation seeks a smaller role in international politics.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_cxcvi@@, citizens are spontaneously attracted to each other.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_cxcvii@@, dog breeding has been banned in accordance with recent animal experimentation laws.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_653@@, illicit spice trade makes desert merchants wrangling worms blush.
Following new legislation in @@eden_contour@@, a generation of children conceived in hell and born in strife is growing up inside government-run care villages.
Following new legislation in @@shangla@@, it is technically inaccurate to call the dead 'worm food'.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_cxciv@@, edutainment video games are taking War Dogs CXCIV's students to the next level.
Following new legislation in @@grimmen@@, clairvoyants and soothsayers find fellowship at their local McRonalds.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_652@@, brains have been removed from lists of best brain foods.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_cxci@@, calling Dog O'War a tyrant is seen as the ultimate compliment.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_cxcii@@, a violent scene on television results in mass mobilization of the National Guard.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_652@@, some are born loving old plays and some have old plays thrust upon them.
@@not_pacific@@ proposed constructing embassies between %%yet_another_region_refounded_again%% and %%squongle_overlords%%.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_652@@, scientists take credit every time it rains in Cainitium.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxxix@@, the state funds the recreational drug habits of every citizen.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_652@@, the Camberus 652ian government is the world's largest NGO.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxxvii@@, religious households enthusiastically use whips in private.
@@ydri@@ agreed to construct embassies between %%rolling_hills_of_ydri%% and %%yet_another_region_refounded_again%%.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_652@@, patch v22.1705 - all developers are now paid for work.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxxvi@@, young adults still believe that dogs deliver newborns to expecting parents.
@@not_pacific@@ proposed constructing embassies between %%yet_another_region_refounded_again%% and %%the_equator%%.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_651@@, fancy dress parties are raided by military police for new recruits.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxxiv@@, debate rages over whether ground fish guts can be spread on fields.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_651@@, Adoptionism now admits men and women into its clergy.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxxi@@, young children are regularly seen wagering pocket money at blackjack tables.
Following new legislation in @@grimmen@@, children often explain to their parents that the Mega Ultimate Sword Fist was worth the thousand-Crown charge on their phone bill.
@@ydri@@ agreed to construct embassies between %%rolling_hills_of_ydri%% and %%interregional_squongle_church%%.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_651@@, it is now illegal for teens to view any sites except Club Kitten and My Little Donkey.
@@aerilia@@ endorsed @@highmoon@@.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxxii@@, citizens are regularly found digging for treasure in their gardens.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_651@@, typing Asher Wiley's name into a search engine always gives zero matches.
@@aerilia@@ endorsed @@jughru@@.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_651@@, hordes of unemployed lumberjacks have resorted to cutting down utility poles to satisfy their cravings.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxvii@@, compass sales have gone south.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxix@@, comic books avoid plot inconsistencies by removing the plot.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxvi@@, popular cartoon characters frequently appear in government-sponsored PSAs reminding students to say no to drugs.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_650@@, the optimally efficient parking strategy for business commuters is referred to as the "traveling salesman problem".
Following new legislation in @@camberus_650@@, the last thing Camberus 650ian soldiers hear before charging into battle is a preacher trying to convert them.
Following new legislation in @@war_dogs_clxxiv@@, when it comes to real men it takes one to know one.
@@war_dogs_clxxiv@@ was reclassified from "Iron Fist Consumerists" to "Father Knows Best State".

Following new legislation in @@justice_breyers_crazy_hypotheticals@@, vats of anabolic steroids are being dumped into the ocean to make Hypothetical mussels the biggest in The Bar on the corner of every region.
Following new legislation in @@united_technates_of_abexilas@@, the government is allowing greater autonomy for some regions in the hopes of quelling growing secessionist movements.
Following new legislation in @@camberus_650@@, for the sake of 'public interest' news programs tell viewers how to home-make Sarin gas bombs.
@@lossantos@@ was founded in %%the_north_pacific%%.
